appraisal_events.evidence: « tellement “tabous” que le père du narrateur lui-même ne se fût pas permis de les sonner… il eût ainsi commis cette inconvenance en pure perte, mais non pas sans dommage pour lui. Car Françoise… lui présenterait toute la journée une figure… et des “messes basses”. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The passage shows that the narrator’s father does not dare to disturb the servants during their lunch and would incur passive reprisals from Françoise, which locally reduces his domestic authority.

status_effects.explanation: His authority within the household is locally diminished by the « tabou » of lunch and Françoise’s power to sanction.
